runTitle: Vercel production complementary release-gate QA for secondary routes and AI workspace
coveredSurfaces: dashboard summary counts (전체 15 / 온라인 14 / 경고 1 / 위험 0 / 오프라인 0)
AI workspace starter prompt send + response

expertAssessments.rationale: Fullscreen AI workspace route, starter prompt send, and production response completion were verified in the same session as the secondary route checks.
The same promoted Vercel production deployment stayed healthy while secondary routes, guest handoff, dashboard modals, and AI route transitions were exercised.
This complementary release-gate run extends reusable Playwright MCP evidence to routes and modals that were skipped in the prior release-gate run.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed before complementary release-gate QA; effective 1.9605 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected usage spike.

artifacts.label: AI workspace console log
artifacts.note: No console errors; only benign preload warnings on AI workspace route

notes: Complementary release-gate run against Vercel production deployment dpl_2MuHQZg4ePQmikAr8MYk5rkWj1ic (commit 7095e76834d0a20e9e35640e753dfa731a6a5e7f).

Dashboard card values were still showing the previously rendered 14:30 KST slot 87/143 while the AI workspace prompt executed after the 14:40 KST rollover; hourly OTel data for the 14:40 slot resolves avg memory to 46.93% -> 47, so the observed 48 vs 47 difference was treated as slot-rollover behavior, not a release regression.
No console errors were observed on /main, /privacy, /auth/error, /auth/success handoff, dashboard, or fullscreen AI workspace during this run.
